scope_lock.source: Polish the first vertical MVP slice (map -> lesson -> reward loop) for MathQuest: Star Trail. Use existing polished art assets and the JSON guidance. Use GSAP for animation. Persist progress to localStorage. No new image generation, no auth, no backend, no Shop/Quests/Practice screen content (nav items are visual placeholders only).
in_scope: Adventure Map screen rendering 7 nodes (21-27) with active node 26 highlighted and pulsing
Top counter pills: level 12, stars 152, streak 7
Bottom nav: Quests, Practice, Shop (visual placeholders, no routing)
Lesson screen: place value question 'Which number is 400 + 30 + 6?' with 4 answer tiles (436 correct)
Lesson progress bar 4/10 and hearts indicator (2 filled + 1 empty)
Reward screen: 'Bridge Repaired!' banner, 3 glowing stars, +60 XP badge, Continue Adventure CTA
State machine with 9 states: boot -> adventure_map -> node_26_selected -> lesson_question -> answer_selected -> feedback -> reward_completion -> save_progress -> return_to_map
Scoring tiers: first-try 10pts+3 stars, after-hint 7pts+2, after-1-wrong 5pts+2, after-multi-wrong 3pts+1; +60 XP completion bonus
Streak +1 when lesson ends with <=1 wrong answer
GSAP timelines for map pulse, node tap, correct/incorrect feedback, reward enter (banner drop, stars pop, XP count-up)
prefers-reduced-motion fallback: opacity-only transitions, static gold border on node 26, instant XP value
out_of_scope: Multi-question lesson sessions (config ships 1 question; 4/10 progress is visual prop)
Backend, authentication, account sync, cloud save
Shop / Quests / Practice screen content or routing (visual nav strip only)
Automated test framework (manual walkthrough is the verification surface for this slice)
Multiple worlds navigation (Number Meadow / Fraction Lagoon / Shape Castle — visual labels only)

design_context.discovery_reason: Greenfield build with full polished art package already present; no integration with external systems; no auth or migration concerns. Light discovery is sufficient to map assets to UI surfaces and define localStorage schema.
